code:
sequenceDiagram
  participant U as User/Annotator
  participant I as Ingestion
  participant T as Transliteration Pipeline
  participant E as Evaluation
  participant A as Artefact Store
  participant F as Fine-Tune
  participant L as Translation
  participant S as Speech Synth
  U->>I: Provide raw audio + notes
  I->>T: Dialogue objects
  T->>E: Candidate transliterations
  E->>U: Low-confidence samples (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)
  U->>E: Feedback + corrections
  E->>A: Accepted artefacts (HealthTech_PatientRecords)
  A->>F: Aligned audio/text pairs
  F->>L: Improved transcriptions
  L->>S: Final translations
  S->>U: Synthesized speech
  U->>E: Validate synthesis (HealthTech_PatientRecords)
repo_description: A repository that implements a service for understanding, writing and recreating dead or almost-dead languages

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个医疗语音数据处理的完整流程图。核心是从用户上传原始音频开始，经过转写、评估、微调，最后输出合成语音。关键参与者包括User/Annotator、Ingestion模块、Transliteration Pipeline、Evaluation、Artefact Store、Fine-Tune、Translation和Speech Synth。
明白了。我注意到Evaluation和User之间有双向交互，特别是Low-confidence samples需要回传给用户标注。另外Artefact Store到Fine-Tune的数据流向是Aligned audio/text pairs对吗？还有HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault和HealthTech_PatientRecords这两个存储系统分别用在哪些环节？
对的。HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault用于存放需要人工复核的低置信度样本，确保合规；HealthTech_PatientRecords则存储最终确认后的Accepted artefacts。另外最后还有一个验证闭环——用户需要Validate synthesis，确认合成语音质量。
好的，我先画出主干流程：User提供原始音频和标注给Ingestion，Ingestion输出Dialogue objects给Transliteration Pipeline，Pipeline生成Candidate transliterations给Evaluation。Evaluation把低置信度样本推给User复核，User返回Feedback和corrections。
后半段流程是：Evaluation把Accepted artefacts存入Artefact Store，然后Fine-Tune模块获取Aligned audio/text pairs进行模型优化，输出Improved transcriptions给Translation，Translation生成Final translations给Speech Synth合成语音，最终回传给User。
已补充后半段。现在检查闭环：User收到Synthesized speech后，还需要向Evaluation提交Validate synthesis的结果，这个验证数据同样存入HealthTech_PatientRecords。整个流程图已经完整了。
稍等，我注意到一个细节：Artefact Store到Fine-Tune的箭头描述应该是'Aligned audio/text pairs'，但我刚才说的是'获取'，实际上更准确的表述是Artefact Store向Fine-Tune提供这些对齐后的数据对。另外Candidate transliterations到Evaluation的流向也要明确是Pipeline推送给Evaluation的。

已修正。现在所有消息流向都准确了：T-E是Candidate transliterations，A-F是Aligned audio/text pairs，F-L是Improved transcriptions，L-S是Final translations。两个存储系统的标注也都正确对应HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault和HealthTech_PatientRecords。流程图可以定稿了。
